Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. The Xkcd thing, now interactive 766 upvotes, 93 comments
  2. C64: Putting Sprite Multiplexing to Work 45 upvotes, 2 comments
  3. Super-Kamiokande – Imaging the sun by detecting neutrinos [video] 78 upvotes, 11 comments
  4. Points on a ring: An interactive walkthrough of a popular math problem 13 upvotes, 0 comments
  5. Show HN: React-Kino – Cinematic scroll storytelling for React (1KB core) 12 upvotes, 0 comments
  6. Show HN: I built a sub-500ms latency voice agent from scratch 512 upvotes, 150 comments
  7. Simple screw counter 226 upvotes, 62 comments
  8. I built a pint-sized Macintosh 79 upvotes, 19 comments
  9. We Built a Video Rendering Engine by Lying to the Browser About What Time It Is 132 upvotes, 50 comments
  10. British Columbia is permanently adopting daylight time 1040 upvotes, 504 comments
  11. I'm losing the SEO battle for my own open source project 230 upvotes, 105 comments
  12. India's top court angry after junior judge cites fake AI-generated orders 278 upvotes, 132 comments
  13. Disable Your SSH access accidentally with scp 16 upvotes, 3 comments
  14. Why No AI Games? 26 upvotes, 7 comments
  15. Meta’s AI smart glasses and data privacy concerns 1289 upvotes, 728 comments
  16. Claude's Cycles: Claude Opus 4.6 solves a problem posed by Don Knuth [pdf] 187 upvotes, 92 comments
  17. I'm reluctant to verify my identity or age for any online services 367 upvotes, 201 comments
  18. Arm's Cortex X925: Reaching Desktop Performance 195 upvotes, 103 comments
  19. Mullvad VPN: Banned TV Ad in the Streets of London [video] 223 upvotes, 124 comments
  20. Ars Technica fires reporter after AI controversy involving fabricated quotes 499 upvotes, 303 comments
  21. Computer Says No 58 upvotes, 27 comments
  22. Launch HN: Cekura (YC F24) – Testing and monitoring for voice and chat AI agents 16 upvotes, 5 comments
  23. Pass-Through of Tariffs: Evidence from European Wine Imports 7 upvotes, 1 comments
  24. History of the Graphical User Interface: The Rise (and Fall?) Of WIMP Design 26 upvotes, 12 comments
  25. The Internet's Top Tech Publications Lost 58% of Their Google Traffic Since 2024 113 upvotes, 80 comments
  26. Florida public universities to pause hiring new H-1B workers 44 upvotes, 26 comments
  27. Apple introduces the new MacBook Air with M5 137 upvotes, 105 comments
  28. Don't Become an Engineering Manager 89 upvotes, 64 comments
  29. Apple unveils new Studio Display and all-new Studio Display XDR 121 upvotes, 102 comments
  30. Apple Introduces MacBook Pro with All‑New M5 Pro and M5 Max 340 upvotes, 350 comments

Last generated 1:00am, 4 March 2026. Source here.
